title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed to go public. M.G. Siegler discusses why this matters for Dario Amodei's company, its timing relative to OpenAI, Claude's current capabilities, and whether the funding is necessary.
